name: mdmind
description: Agent skills for authoring, validating, querying, and exporting mdmind Markdown maps.

interface.shortDescription: Author and inspect mdmind Markdown maps
interface.longDescription: Bundle the mdmind map-authoring and mdm CLI inspection skills so Codex can create durable Markdown maps, validate structure, inspect TODO maps, query ids and metadata, and export focused context.
defaultPrompt: Turn these notes into an mdmind map.
Validate and export this mdmind map.
